title: The Core Question for AI Activation
summary: AI activation requires answering a fundamental engineering question to build trust and avoid being a fleeting novelty.
charlotte_impact: Focusing on engineering principles ensures AI experiences are meaningful and build lasting trust with users.

title: Big Tech's AI Spending Pays Off for Google Cloud

title: Google Photos Introduces AI Wardrobe Tool

title: AI Spending Drives Google Cloud's Revenue Surge

title: Teens Rely on Social Media for News, Remain Skeptical

title: AI Code Review Misses Half of Bugs

title: AI Governance Gap Hinders Procurement Adoption
